description_long: This object is a neatly stacked trio of round, golden-brown pancakes, each layer uniform in thickness and color. The top pancake is adorned with a small, square pat of butter placed precisely at the center, giving a classic breakfast appearance. The pancakes rest on a smooth, white ceramic plate with a slightly raised rim, providing a clean and simple presentation. The surface of the pancakes appears soft and slightly matte, with no visible texture or crisp edges. A small dollop of syrup is visible on the edge of the top pancake in one view, suggesting a touch of sweetness. The overall look is appetizing, clean, and stylized, suitable for a food display or urban café setting.
description: A stack of three golden-brown pancakes with a square pat of butter on top, served on a white ceramic plate. The pancakes are smooth, soft, and slightly matte, with a small amount of syrup visible on the edge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full stack of pancakes with a centered butter pat and no visible syrup.
description_view_1: Rotated view with the butter pat still centered, and the pancake edges remain smooth and clean.
description_view_2: This view reveals a small dollop of syrup on the edge of the top pancake, with the butter pat still visible.
description_view_3: Another angled view showing the butter pat and the clean, round edges of the pancakes, with no syrup visible.
